items.title: Tata Steel Q3 Results: Cons PAT soars 723% YoY to Rs 2,689 crore, revenue up 6%
items.description: Steel major Tata Steel reported a 723% jump in its December quarter consolidated net profit at Rs 2,689 crore compared to Rs 327 crore reported in the year ago period.

items.title: SBI Q3 Results Preview: PAT to fall up to 15% QoQ despite up to 4% likely growth in NII. 5 things to watch
items.description: SBI is set to post steady Q3FY26 results with healthy loan growth and resilient net interest income, but sequential profit may dip as margins compress, provisions rise, and one-off gains are absent, keeping focus on asset quality and management commentary.

items.title: NSE Q3 Results: Profit falls 37% YoY to Rs 2,408 crore
items.description: NSE Q3 Results: Leading exchange NSE reported a 37% year-on-year (YoY) slump in its consolidated net profit at Rs 2,408 crore in the third quarter, while total income fell 9% YoY to Rs 4,395 crore.

items.title: Kalyan Jewellers Q3 Results: Consolidated profit rises 90% to Rs 416 crore
items.description: Jewellery retailer Kalyan Jewellers India on Friday reported a 90.36 per cent growth in consolidated net profit to Rs 416.29 crore.

items.title: Spencer's Retail Q3 loss widens to Rs 58.4 cr, revenue slips marginally
items.description: The company posted a net loss of Rs 47.34 crore in the October-December period a year ago, according to a regulatory filing from Spencer's Retail, a RP Sanjiv Goenka group firm.

items.title: Jana Small Finance Bank Q3 Results: Profit plunges 91% to Rs 10 crore
items.description: Jana Small Finance Bank reported a 91% drop in third quarter net profit at Rs 10 crore as compared with Rs 111 crore in the year-ago period, owing to higher provisions and other operating expenses.

items.title: Kalyan Jewellers clocks 42% YoY growth in Q3 revenue at Rs 10,343 crore
items.description: Jewellery retailer Kalyan Jewellers has clocked a consolidated revenue of Rs 10,343 crore in Q3 FY26 as against Rs 7,278 crore in the corresponding period of the previous year, a growth of 42%. Consolidated Profit After Tax (PAT) for Q3 FY26 was Rs 416 crore as against a PAT of Rs 219 crore for the corresponding period in the previous year, a growth of 90%.

items.title: Thomas Cook reports Q3 net profit of Rs 45 crore, revenue at Rs 2,146 crore
items.description: The budget announcements on government initiatives in infrastructure development, skilling 10,000 tourist guides, creating a digital repository, and promoting archeological sites are welcome moves, but in the absence of adequate marketing and promotions, one may not see the appropriate tourism growth numbers, said Thomas Cook (India) CEO Mahesh Iyer in an interview with ET.

items.title: Tata Steel Q3 profit soars 9-fold YoY to Rs 2,730 crore on Dutch unit boost
items.description: Tata Steel’s consolidated net profit surged more than ninefold from a year earlier in the December quarter as a sharp improvement in profitability at its Dutch unit and steady operations in India helped offset wider operating losses in the UK.

items.title: Shree Cement Q3 Results: Cons PAT surges 38% YoY  to Rs 268 crore
items.description: “Sales volumes were adversely impacted during the quarter due to loss of production on account of operations disruption at Baloda Bazar, Chhattisgarh,” the company said in a statement.

items.title: Tata Motors PV posts Rs 3,486 crore loss in Q3 as JLR cyber impact drags results
items.description: Tata Motors Passenger Vehicles (TMPV) slipped to a consolidated net loss in the December quarter from a year-earlier profit, hit by the continued fallout of a cyberattack at its British luxury car unit Jaguar Land Rover and a challenging global demand environment.

items.title: BLS International reports net profit of Rs 170 crore for Q3, revenue at Rs 736 crore
items.description: BLS International has reported a net profit of Rs 170 crore for quarter three of this fiscal, up 33% year on year. The company reported revenues of Rs 736 crore, up 44% year on year.

items.title: Dish TV India sinks deeper into losses in Q3 as subscription revenues continue to slide
items.description: Dish TV reported a net loss of approximately Rs 276 crore for Q3 FY26, sharply higher than the loss of around Rs 47 crore reported in the same quarter last year. The company reported exceptional items of around Rs 70 crore during the quarter, taking the loss before tax to about Rs 276 crore.
